title: cast of a SQL boolean value to a string or clob or (var)char is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_fuzzing (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, flag INTEGER, description TEXT);
SELECT id, flag, CASE flag WHEN 1 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as flag_str FROM t_fuzzing ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, flag, CASE WHEN description = 'True' THEN 1 WHEN description = 'False' THEN 0 ELSE NULL END as desc_to_bool FROM t_fuzzing WHERE flag IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
key_bug_features: casting SQL boolean value to string or varchar
